perturbed_task_language: Push the cream cheese to the front of the stove
perturbation_semantics: Base task pushed the plate; perturbation swaps the target object to the cream cheese (smaller, narrower box). Same goal region (main_table_stove_front_region).
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot likely pushes the base-task object (plate) to the front of the stove and fails the perturbed predicate On(cream_cheese_1, stove_front_region).
strategy_notes: Perception-isolated push. (1) From image_cam_00 + world_00 located cream_cheese_1 visually as the only elevated blue-coloured small object (RGB B-R>15, z>0.91): median world xy=(-0.041,+0.112) at z=0.92 (top surface). Confirmed with wrist cam after first move: world_wrist_01 median (-0.041,+0.112). (2) Located stove fixture white top via grep-mask: x in [-0.245,-0.165], y in [+0.119,+0.293], top z=0.927; dark cook_region at xy~(-0.214,+0.200). (3) Located target zone main_table_stove_front_region via libero region parsing in envs/problems/libero_kitchen_tabletop_manipulation.py (workspace_offset = (0, 0, 0.90)) and the region rectangle (-0.09, 0.17, -0.01, 0.25) in main_table frame, giving world centroid (-0.05, +0.21), size 8x8 cm, so target xy must satisfy x in [-0.09,-0.01] AND y in [+0.17,+0.25]. (4) Strategy: cream cheese starts at x=-0.041 already inside the region's x band, only needed +0.10 in y. (5) Push: close gripper, pre-position eef at (-0.04, +0.04, 1.05) directly behind the box in -y, descend to z=0.91 (OSC kitchen-floor was 0.92 effective, fingertips at box mid-height to push the side instead of skating over the top), then move_to (-0.04, +0.20, 0.91). The +y sweep at z=0.91 contacted the box's -y face and slid it forward; predicate fired mid-push. Earlier attempts at z=0.93/0.98 slid OVER the box (no contact). Earlier diagonal pushes had also displaced the box toward the stove (x<-0.10), confirming the region is in FRONT of the stove (more +x) not at the stove, before resetting to do a clean pure-+y push. Final cream cheese center (perception): xy=(-0.027,+0.175) z=0.92, inside the 8x8 cm region.

pick_result.note: No pi0_pick used in the final recipe; this is a pure paddle-push solution (closed gripper).

final_state.task_language: Push the cream cheese to the front of the stove
